subcodes.title: Words to Asadullah Qumi spoken around Sept. 1910
subcodes.first_line: Do you realize the meaning of my statement... Tell the friends, how, under severe circumstances of bodily weakness, I have accepted... A clipping from the newspaper of Moaid...
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
